headline: A Look At LyondellBasell (LYB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Recycling Growth Plans
summary: Stock performance snapshot and recent context LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) stock has pulled back about 11% over the past month, while still showing a gain of roughly 2% over the past 3 months and about 52% year to date. Over the past year the stock has returned around 29%. However, the 3 year and 5 year total returns show declines of about 11% and 15%. This provides important context for anyone reviewing the recent move. See our latest analysis for LyondellBasell Industries. Recent moves...

headline: Intrepid Potash Increases Share Repurchase Authorization to $50M
summary: IPI raises its share repurchase authorization to $50M, backed by stronger operations and a healthier balance sheet.
